column1: IKEA US LLC, 420 Alan Wood Road, Conshohocken, PA 19428
Payment Terms: Prepayment required (invoice issued upon order confirmation)
Note: Free delivery on orders over $5,000. Assembly available at per-item rates below.
MARKUS Office chair — Vissle dark grey
LANGFJALL Conference chair — Gunnared dark grey/black
Delivery — Truck Delivery to Business Address (orders over $5000)
Monitors/displays are not available through IKEA for Business. Please source separately.

Pricing reflects current IKEA Business pricing as of March 2026. Availability subject to stock. Assembly performed by IKEA-certified TaskRabbit partners. All products include standard IKEA warranty (10 years on BEKANT desks, 10 years on MARKUS chairs). Bulk order (40+ units) — dedicated Business delivery with scheduled appointment window.
